title: gravesia rutenbergiana var. onivensis
intro: Gravesia rutenbergiana var. onivensis is a rare and lesser-known species of the Gravesia plant family, which is native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gravesia rutenbergiana var. onivensis include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
